mapper.select: select p.*, u.nickname as userNickname from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id order by p.createtime desc

select p.*, u.nickname as userNickname, (select count(*) from comment where post_id = p.id) as commentCount, (select count(*) from `like` where target_id = p.id and target_type = 'post') as likeCount from post p join user u on p.user_id = u.id where p.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update post set view_count = view_count + 1 where id = #{id}
update post set like_count = like_count + 1 where id = #{id}
update post set like_count = like_count - 1 where id = #{id}
update post set comment_count = comment_count + 1 where id = #{postId}
update post set comment_count = comment_count - 1 where id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: insert into post (user_id, title, content, type, cover, video_url, view_count, like_count, comment_count, createtime, updatetime) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{cover}, #{videoUrl}, 0, 0, 0, now(), now())
mapper.update: update post set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, cover = #{cover}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, updatetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select type as name, count(*) as value from post group by type
select date_format(createtime, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(*) as value from post group by date_format(createtime, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date
select * from post where user_id = #{userId} order by createtime desc

select p.*, u.nickname as userNickname from post p join user u on p.user_id = u.id join collection col on p.id = col.target_id where col.user_id = #{userId} and col.target_type = 'post' order by col.createtime desc
